allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://unsplash.com/napi/search/photos?query=olive+grove&per_page=6&orientation=landscape" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25 -Headers @{"User-Agent"="Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\)"}; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $j.results | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\) | $\($_.width\)x$\($_.height\) | $\($_.description\) $\($_.alt_description\)" })

PowerShell($files = [ordered]@{ "hero-k"="Korfu \(GR\), Agii Douli, Olivenhain -- 2018 -- 1284-8.jpg"; "hero-lun"="Lun Olive-Gardens \(2\).jpg"; "harvest-t"="Raccolta olive in ambito familiare, tradizione toscana.jpg"; "crate"="Tradizioni familiari Raccolta olive wlk olive in cassetta.jpg"; "combs"="Olive harvest combs. Anthidona. Greece.jpg" }; foreach \($k in $files.Keys\) { try { $u = "https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:FilePath/" + [uri]::EscapeDataString\($files[$k]\) + "?width=1600"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -OutFile "C:\\Users\\ADMIN\\Desktop\\ex\\assets\\img\\candidates\\$k.jpg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 -Headers @{"User-Agent"="KeremAdarSiteBuilder/1.0 \(personal project; gemimed@gmail.com\)"} -ErrorAction Stop; $size = \(Get-Item "C:\\Users\\ADMIN\\Desktop\\ex\\assets\\img\\candidates\\$k.jpg"\).Length; "$k OK $\([math]::Round\($size/1KB\)\)KB" } catch { "$k FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6 })
